description: Minimal offline dictation app for Windows 11 — .NET 8/C#/WPF system tray app with Whisper.net STT

userStories.title: Project scaffold and system tray shell
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a .NET 8 WPF project with a system tray icon and context menu so that we have the foundation for all other features.
acceptanceCriteria: dotnet new wpf project targets net8.0-windows and x64; dotnet build succeeds
App launches with no main window, only a system tray icon with context menu items: Settings, History, Quit
Clicking Quit exits the app cleanly

userStories.title: Global hotkey and microphone recording
userStories.description: As a user, I want to press a global hotkey to start/stop recording my voice so that I can dictate from any application.
acceptanceCriteria: Global hotkey (default Ctrl+Shift+D) registered via RegisterHotKey works regardless of focused window; pressing toggles between idle and recording states
NAudio captures microphone audio as 16kHz mono PCM WAV suitable for Whisper; recording saves to a temp file
Tray icon changes appearance (e.g., red overlay) while recording; sound effects play on start and stop

userStories.title: Offline Whisper transcription and auto-paste
userStories.description: As a user, I want my recorded audio transcribed locally and the result pasted into the active window so that dictation is seamless and fully offline.
acceptanceCriteria: Whisper.net processes the recorded WAV using the small model from %APPDATA%\Dikta\models\ and returns transcribed text
After transcription, text is placed on clipboard and Ctrl+V is simulated via SendInput to paste into the previously active window
If the Whisper model is not found on disk, a dialog prompts the user to download/extract it before first use

userStories.title: Settings, history, and config persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want to customize my hotkey and language, and see my recent transcriptions, so that Dikta fits my workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings window allows changing: hotkey (via capture dialog), language (English/Swedish), Whisper model (small/medium); changes persist to %APPDATA%\Dikta\config.json
History submenu in tray context menu shows last 10 transcriptions (truncated preview); clicking copies full text to clipboard; history persists to %APPDATA%\Dikta\history.json
On first launch, if microphone access is denied, a dialog explains how to enable it in Windows Privacy Settings
